description: Current-state legacy temporal field definitions allowed by the RFC-0083 Slice 1 temporal vocabulary guard.

allowlist.reason: Existing business date, snapshot, and timeseries table columns. New public contracts must use domain-specific temporal names.
Existing reference and series source-observed timestamp columns. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Legacy reference-data ingestion DTO fields have been moved into focused DTO-family modules. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Legacy benchmark, index, benchmark-return, and risk-free ingestion DTO fields have been moved into focused DTO-family modules. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Legacy benchmark definition, composition, and benchmark-return ingestion DTO fields have been moved into focused DTO-family modules. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Benchmark definition ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.
Benchmark composition ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.

Benchmark return-series ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.
Legacy index definition, index price, index return, and risk-free ingestion DTO fields have been moved into focused DTO-family modules. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Index definition ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.
Index price-series ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.
Index return-series ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.
Risk-free series ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.

Classification taxonomy ingestion now exposes canonical observed_at through shared SourceObservationLineage while accepting legacy source_timestamp as an input alias and mapping to persistence columns.
Existing reference integration DTO fields. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
